hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Fourth project type (hardening/crypto-operational). 3-phase workflow completed: consensus planning, 4-wave parallel execution, gate verification. All gates passed first try.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: E2E gate surfaced baseline discrepancy (28 claimed vs 33 actual pre-existing failures). Isolation testing methodology required to distinguish regressions from pre-existing failures. Gate integrity feedback caught misleading initial comparison.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: All 5 H7 instructions audited (see retro). Security: notification payloads generic (N/A — no notifications in M11). Prod-eng: 27 new tests, all behavioral. UX: no permission auto-requesting. Architect: no crypto parallelism. PM: Gherkin acceptance criteria with failure scenarios.
